name: Cossacks: European Wars

registry.reg_content:
Windows Registry Editor Version 5.00

[HKEY_CURRENT_USER\Software\GSC Game World\Cossacks - European Wars]
"ScreenWidth"=dword:00000400
"ScreenHeight"=dword:00000300
"Windowed"=dword:00000001

notes: Requires single CPU affinity (WINE_CPU_TOPOLOGY=1:0) on Wine 8+. GOG version 2.1.0.13. Registry keys for display settings are best-effort — may need adjustment after testing with actual installer.

retry_variants.description: cnc-ddraw DirectDraw replacement (recommended for DirectDraw init failures)
Force single CPU with virtual desktop
